COMPEL.name: Compel
COMPEL.description: Enemy deals !reduction_percent!% less attack damage next turn. Spend up to !max_spend! Influence for +!bonus_percent_per_spend!% each.

CHAIN_OF_COMMAND.name: Chain of Command
CHAIN_OF_COMMAND.description: If you played an Order this turn, gain !block! Block. Otherwise gain !influence! Influence.

FEINT_RETREAT.name: Feint Retreat
FEINT_RETREAT.description: Gain !block! Block. Your next Attack this turn deals +!next_attack_bonus! damage.

TARGET_EXPOSURE.name: Target Exposure
TARGET_EXPOSURE.description: Apply !vulnerable_base! Vulnerable. If Influence ≥ !vulnerable_threshold!, apply !vulnerable_high! instead.

CUT_SUPPLY_LINES.name: Cut Supply Lines
CUT_SUPPLY_LINES.description: Deal !damage! damage. If enemy is debuffed, gain !influence! Influence.

DISSIDENT_NETWORK.name: Dissident Network
DISSIDENT_NETWORK.description: At end of turn, if you played !skills_threshold!+ Skills, gain !influence! Influence.

BLACK_ORDER.name: Black Order
BLACK_ORDER.description: Spend !influence_cost! Influence: apply !weak! Weak and deal !damage! damage.

DISSIDENT_NETWORK+.name: Dissident Network+
DISSIDENT_NETWORK+.description: At end of turn, if you played !skills_threshold!+ Skills, gain !influence! Influence. First trigger each combat: draw !draw_first_trigger! card.
